data.name: DOCUMENT_ALREADY_EXISTS
data.value: A person with this document already exists.

data.name: CANNOT_DELETE_CATEGORY_WITH_TRANSACTIONS
data.value: Cannot delete a category that has associated transactions.

data.name: CANNOT_DELETE_PERSON_WITH_TRANSACTIONS
data.value: Cannot delete a person that has associated transactions.

data.name: DB_ERROR
data.value: Database error. Check logs for details.
